reference: I had my second Depo-Provera injection in March, one day after the earliest date I could. Recently, I have experienced headaches, cloudy urine, dizzy spells, strange cravings, and an assortment of other seemingly pregnancy-related symptoms. Is pregnancy possible while using the Depo-Provera injection, or are these all side effects?
text: This is because plant life is absolutely prolific, even as the core of the Earth is exploding.
